title: 10 Herbal Cream Remedies for Middle Age and Irritable Bowel Syndrome Sufferers
description: Zingiber officinale creams, also known as ginger creams, have been used to help alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS). The active compounds in ginger, such as gingerols and shogaols, have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that may help to reduce inflammation and spasms in the digestive tract. This can lead to a reduction in symptoms such as bloating, abdominal pain, and changes in bowel movements.  To use ginger creams for IBS, apply a thin layer to the abdome...
